İstanbul → Global · Est. 2026

What comes next starts here.

inner.hub is a private circle of founders, builders, and investors. People who meet early and support each other first.

No tickets. No tiers. Just the circle, gently curated.

No tickets. No tiers.

Request an invitation
↓
scroll
inner·signal ·inner·match ·inner·capital ·inner·vault ·inner·pulse ·inner·id ·inner·api ·inner·bounty ·inner·signal ·inner·match ·inner·capital ·inner·vault ·inner·pulse ·inner·id ·inner·api ·inner·bounty ·
01 · The ideaComing together
AI is the center of this circle. Around it are the founders, builders, and investors pushing what comes next. inner.hub brings them together. It starts in İstanbul, and it starts early.
02 · The first thirty-fourFounding seats

It starts with thirty-four people, chosen one by one:

Founders

People building startups, in AI and beyond.

Builders

Engineers and researchers doing serious AI work.

Investors

Angel investors and people from venture funds.

These thirty-four are not just members. They are the founding members of inner.hub.

03 · The platform

Built for the pace of a closed circle.

Access is by invitation. Always.

Request an invitation

AI Layer

inner·signal

AI-powered deal and opportunity feed. The right signals, before anyone else sees them.

Matching

inner·match

Co-founder, mentor, and investor matching inside a closed circle. Trust-based connections.

Investments

inner·capital

Private deal flow and investment pipeline. SPVs, demo days, and co-investment opportunities.

+5 more tools

Knowledge

inner·vault

Shared knowledge base. Pitch decks, market research, and documents — permissioned and searchable.

Intelligence

inner·pulse

Live ecosystem signal dashboard. What's moving, what's trending, what matters — inside only.

Identity

inner·id

Portable verified membership identity. Your inner.hub membership carries weight beyond the platform.

Platform

inner·api

Platform API for integrations and partners. Build on top of the inner.hub infrastructure.

Marketplace

inner·bounty

Community task system. Companies post challenges, members solve them, platform facilitates.

04 · What this isThe point

Big things start here. New ideas are discussed here, tested here, and supported here — by people who can actually build them and fund them.

05 · EntryBy invitation

Entry is by invitation. Always.

There are no tickets, no tiers, and no public list. Members are put forward from inside the circle, considered with care, and invited personally.

Your name

Someone inside the circle puts your name forward.

Consideration

We take our time. Fit beats fame.

Invitation

If it is right, you hear from us directly.

06 · The gatheringSep 2026 · İstanbul

The first inner.hub gathering. İstanbul, September 2026.

0People
0Days
0Modules
34 · One circleThirty-four squares forming one circle.

Thirty-four people. Two days. One circle. The first of many.

07 · What's nextIn time

hub is where it starts.

We are building something bigger, step by step. We announce things when they are real. There is more.

08 · Request an invitationWe read everything

Request an invitation.

Most people arrive by invitation, but good people also find us on their own. Tell us who you are and what you are building.

The next wave knows each other · İstanbul → Global
